comment: License-aware registry of every purchased/imported asset under public/assets/. Raw downloads live in raw-assets/ (gitignored); only curated keepers land here. tests/unit/asset-manifest.test.ts is the integrity gate: every file listed must exist with the stated geometry, and every image under the covered directories must be listed. POLICY: any NEW directory of imported assets under public/assets/ must be added to coveredDirs in the same change, or the gate cannot see it (fonts/ and the engine wasm are first-party, not imports).

packs.title: High Dragon (+ Death Animation add-on)
packs.author: Electric Lemon Games
packs.source: itch.io (purchased; raws in raw-assets/itch/high-dragon/)
packs.license: Electric Lemon Games Public License — full text in bosses/dragon/LICENSE.txt. Use in for-profit/non-profit games permitted; attribution appreciated but not required; raw redistribution outside a game/application product forbidden. Committed here because public/assets/ is the shipped game payload itself (a web build serves these files verbatim).
packs.mappedUse: Boss-tier dragon for the rail-command arc — replaces the boss-scale uses of the .pix sprite:dragon grid flagged 'weak / green smear' in docs/PIXEL-ART-AUDIT.md. Trash-tier palette-swap uses of sprite:dragon are NOT covered; those need bespoke bodies per SA.3 gap 1.
packs.notes: Strips are laid out as 4 consecutive direction blocks (right block first; left block is an exact horizontal mirror of right) of framesPerDirection frames each, except death which is single-direction. *-no-shadow variants exist for the airborne/death animations so the renderer can own shadow placement.

packs.title: Dragon-kin (baked recolors of High Dragon)
packs.author: Electric Lemon Games (recolored offline by scripts/bake-dragon-kin.mjs)
packs.source: Derived from the high-dragon pack — one recolored set per spine map's kin.
packs.license: Inherits the High Dragon license (bosses/dragon-kin/<slug>/LICENSE.txt copied from source).
packs.mappedUse: Per-map dragon-kin bosses (docs/RAIL-COMMAND.md §dragon's kin): the green High Dragon hue-rotated to each kin's color, baked to disk so each set is QC-able by reading its PNGs. Referenced by sprite:high-dragon-<slug>.
packs.notes: Generated — do not hand-edit. Re-run scripts/bake-dragon-kin.mjs after changing any dragonKin hue.

packs.title: The Roguelike v1.16.1 (mega-sheet)
packs.author: Backterria
packs.source: itch.io (purchased; manual import — attribution baked into the sheet corners)
packs.license: Backterria itch.io pack terms (see pack page at url); game-use licensed to purchaser. Sheet carries its own baked-in credit (backterria / the roguelike v1.16.1).
packs.mappedUse: 16x16 category-columned mega-sheet (terrain, fortifications, creatures, items, weapons, armor, tools, props) — prime source for SA.3 region props, pickups/items, and prop breadth. Curation requires a slicer manifest mapping cell coords to asset ids before cells become addressable content.

packs.title: Fantasy RPG Characters: Warriors - Mages - Rogues - Citizens!
packs.author: Electric Lemon Games (same author + license shape as the High Dragon)
packs.source: itch.io (purchased; raws in raw-assets/extracted/{citizens-guards-warriors,warriors_rogues_mages,heavy-knight}/)
packs.license: Electric Lemon pack terms (pack page at url): attribution NOT necessary, no reselling/standalone distribution of the assets, commercial and non-commercial game use okay.
packs.mappedUse: SA.5 cast conversion (docs/CAST-CONVERSION.md) — pack convention is 12 animation states x 4 directions, 4 frames per animation (combat sheets pack some attacks two-directions-per-row at 2 frames). Keepers so far: hooded mage (forest/thorn shamans), sword & shield fighter (the knight). Remaining warriors/rogues/citizens/heavy-knight stay in raw-assets until their cast slots wire up.

packs.license: CC0 / public domain (License.txt in the pack) — free for commercial use, no attribution required.
packs.mappedUse: Dungeon tile-family breadth (census: worst region at 3 families). 16px cells on a 17px pitch (1px margins). First slices: cracked/shattered/rat-marked stone-floor variants auditioning against the dark dungeon palette.

packs.title: RPG Tiles Vector (Kenney) — 64px soft-shaded outdoor terrain
packs.author: Kenney (kenney.nl)
packs.source: itch.io / kenney.nl (CC0)
packs.license: CC0 1.0 (public domain)
packs.mappedUse: Outdoor terrain at native 64px: grass/dirt/water/stone fills + autotile edges, trees, walls, roofs, doors. The richest-resolution terrain pack — ground bakes at native res so it never magnifies into a flat fill.
